_comment: Hook de review automatique Vue 3. Injecter ce contenu dans .claude/settings.json ou .claude/settings.local.json de votre projet. Nécessite : jq installé, agent vue-reviewer dans .claude/agents/.

hooks.command:
INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git[[:space:]]+commit'; then DIFF=$(git diff --staged -- '*.vue' '*.ts' '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null | head -500); if [ -n "$DIFF" ]; then printf '%s' "$DIFF" | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:("[vue-reviewer] Fichiers Vue 3 stagés détectés avant commit. Invoke the vue-reviewer agent on this diff first, then proceed with the commit if no critical issues are found.

Staged diff (truncated at 500 lines):
```diff
"+.+"
```")}}' 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi
